steps.summary: Applied design framework: extract-then-remove approach, 4-phase migration, 12 tasks. Incorporated stakeholder corrections: orchestration is family-specific, workflow-execution deprecated.
12-task plan across 4 phases. Phase 1: skill extraction (8 tasks, 2.5-3.5h). Phase 2: slim rules.toon (1 task). Phase 3: server code (2 tasks). Phase 4: documentation (1 task). Total: 3.5-4.5h.
14 test cases across 5 categories: rules loader (5), skill loader (3), workflow loader (3), integration (3). Plus 3 manual behavioral equivalence verifications.
Two-paragraph solution overview written to README.md under Solution Overview section.
4 planning-phase assumptions: A-06-01 through A-06-04, all code-analyzable.
Assumptions log updated: 19 total (12 validated, 1 invalidated, 6 open).
All 4 planning assumptions validated through code analysis. Convergence in 1 iteration.
Feature branch up to date with origin/main.
PR #89 description updated via REST API with 4-phase implementation plan.

checkpoints.summary: Non-blocking, auto-advance 30s. Yielded with plan context.
